# Thamanvi Silks

> Authentic silk saree store based in Puttur, Karnataka, India. Rated 4.8 stars on Google (425+ reviews). Specializes in Kanjivaram, Banarasi, and Mysore Silk sarees for weddings, festivals, and everyday wear.

Thamanvi Silks sells 100% pure silk sarees sourced from authentic weaving regions across India. Free shipping available across India. Physical store located at Ground Floor, Bappalige Tower, Bypass Road, Bappalige, Mani, Puttur, Karnataka 574201.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://thamanvi.com/): Shop all sarees, collections, and current offers
- [Kanjivaram Silk Collection](https://thamanvi.com/collections/kanjivaram-silk): Pure Kanjivaram silk sarees from Kanchipuram
- [Banarasi Silk Collection](https://thamanvi.com/collections/banarasi-silk): Banarasi silk sarees with brocade weaving
- [Mysore Silk Collection](https://thamanvi.com/collections/mysore-silk): Mysore Silk sarees from Karnataka
- [Wedding Silk Collection](https://thamanvi.com/collections/wedding-silk): Bridal and wedding saree collection

## Facts

- Founded: Thamanvi Silks & Sarees, Puttur, Karnataka
- Rating: 4.8/5 on Google (425+ reviews), 4.8/5 on Justdial (363 votes)
- Contact: WhatsApp +91 95357 79597
- Payment: Online payment (UPI, cards, wallets, netbanking via Razorpay)
- Shipping: Free shipping across India
- Returns: Open box return and free exchange policy
